```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue focuses on migrating the `develop/styleguide/*` files from the Plone documentation, particularly for version 6.x. The existing content lacks integration with current automation tools like `black`, `isort`, and `flake8` for Python code, as well as tools for documentation checks.

## What needs to be done
The goal is to update the style guide to align with the latest Python style specifications and ensure it is properly automated. This includes reviewing the current content and implementing necessary updates.

## Helpful background
This issue is a bit complex because it involves understanding current Python style guides and ensuring the migration aligns with ongoing revisions. New contributors are advised to familiarize themselves with the [Contributing to Documentation](https://6.docs.plone.org/contributing/index.html) guide.

## Good first steps
- Read the [Contributing to Documentation](https://6.docs.plone.org/contributing/index.html) to understand the process.
- Familiarize yourself with the current style guide at [Rendered Documentation](https://5.docs.plone.org/develop/styleguide/index.html).
- Explore issues marked with the ["41: easy"](https://github.com/plone/documentation/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%2241+lvl%3A+easy%22) label for beginner-friendly tasks.
```
